name: severity resolver: rule.meta.defaultOptions merge with user options (user wins on conflict)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule trace-options --config '["error",{"max":5}]' --in "$PWD/file.js" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E 'effective_options=\\{\"max\":5,\"min\":0\\}' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
